Brisbane & Beyond

What We Build

Complete Pool Solutions,
Start to Finish

Everything you need to create your dream outdoor space — designed and built by the same trusted team.

Custom Concrete Pools

Fully bespoke inground pools designed around your block, lifestyle, and budget — built to last a lifetime.

Learn more

Water Features

Water walls, fountains, and spillways that transform your pool into an architectural statement.

Learn more

Coping & Surrounds

Travertine, marble, granite, and porcelain finishes that elevate the look of your whole outdoor area.

Learn more

Pool Fencing

Safety-compliant frameless glass and panel fencing that adds elegance without breaking your view.

Learn more

Pool Renovations

Breathe new life into an ageing pool — new finishes, coping, features, and updated equipment.

Learn more

Integrated Spas

A spa that flows seamlessly with your pool design — the ultimate year-round backyard experience.

Learn more
View All Services

Our Work

Dream Pools, Delivered

View All Projects

Why Mediterranean Pools

The Difference is in
the Details

Building a pool is a significant investment. We understand that — and it's why we've built our entire business around transparency, genuine care, and uncompromising quality.

01

30+ Years of Craft

Brad's decades of hands-on experience means you're getting deep expertise, not guesswork — reflected in every pool we build.

02

Fully Custom — No Shortcuts

Every pool is designed specifically for your block, lifestyle, and vision. No cookie-cutter shapes, no off-the-shelf finishes.

03

Transparent Pricing

Detailed, itemised quotes upfront. No hidden costs, no nasty surprises at handover. Honest business, always.

04

Local, Family-Owned

South Brisbane based — we know Queensland's climate, soil, and council requirements. We're your neighbours, not a franchise.

Our Full Story

How It Works

Your Pool, Step by Step

A streamlined, stress-free process refined over 30+ years so you always know what's happening.

1

Free Consultation

We visit your property, listen to your ideas, and assess your site — completely free.

2

Custom Design

We create a tailored design and itemised quote built around your space and budget.

3

Permits & Approvals

We handle all council permits and engineering certifications on your behalf.

4

Expert Construction

Brad and our team build with precision, keeping you updated at every stage.

5

Premium Finishing

Coping, tiling, fencing, water features — every detail attended to with care.

6

Handover & Support

We walk you through your new pool and remain available for ongoing support.

Client Stories

What Our Clients Say

"Brad and the team built us an absolutely stunning pool. The whole process was stress-free — they kept us informed every step of the way and the result exceeded our expectations."

Sarah & Michael T.

Norman Park, Brisbane

"We got quotes from four builders. Mediterranean Pools were the most honest about costs upfront, had the best ideas for our space, and delivered exactly what they promised."

James K.

Hendra, Brisbane

"The attention to detail is incredible. From the mosaic waterline tiles to the frameless glass fencing — every element was perfectly executed. Our backyard is transformed."

The Williams Family

Corinda, Brisbane

FAQ

Questions About Pool Construction

Most custom concrete pools take 8–16 weeks from excavation to handover, depending on size, features, and council approval timelines. We provide a detailed project timeline at the quoting stage.

Yes — we manage all council approvals, building permits, and engineering certifications. We know the Queensland pool safety requirements inside out.

We primarily service Brisbane and surrounds, including the Sunshine Coast, Gold Coast, and South East Queensland. Contact us with your suburb to confirm.

Concrete pools offer unlimited shape, size, and finish options — the premium choice for custom designs. They're the most durable and can be built to suit virtually any backyard.

Brisbane concrete pools typically range from $40,000 to $150,000+ depending on size, shape, depth, finishes, and features. We provide transparent, itemised quotes — no hidden costs.

Absolutely. We specialise in full renovations — updating finishes, replacing coping, adding water features, upgrading equipment, and transforming dated pools.

Ready to Start?

Let's Build Your
Dream Pool

Free, no-obligation consultation. We'll assess your site, listen to your vision, and provide a detailed custom quote — all within 24 hours.
